name: Highland United Neighbors Farmers' Market
notes: Could not confirm a legitimate official website or Facebook page for this specific market. On-file website (hobnobevents.com) is HobNob Events' generic company homepage, not a page for this market by name. Searched extensively: (1) Highland United Neighbors, Inc. (HUNI), the Highland-neighborhood RNO, has an official site (denverhighland.org) and Facebook (facebook.com/HighlandUnitedNeighbors) but neither mentions organizing, hosting, or sponsoring a farmers market. (2) The on-file address '970 S. Pearl, Denver, CO 80209' does not match any known current Denver market: South Pearl Street Farmers Market (run by HobNob Events, official site southpearlstreet.com) is at the 1400-1500 blocks of S Pearl St / 1527 S Pearl St, 80210 - not 970/80209. HobNob's other markets (Farmers Market at Highlands Square, W 32nd Ave & Lowell Blvd 80211; Central Park Farmers Market) also don't match this address or name. (3) Third-party aggregator listings (marketspread.com/market/6992, givinggarden.io) show this exact name/address but are NFMD-derived (excluded per instructions as non-official) and one explicitly flags 'Market no longer operational? Let us know!' suggesting it may be defunct or a stale/duplicate USDA directory entry. No official source clearly ties HUNI to any operating farmers market at this address, so no fields could be verified from a legitimate official source.
